summary: Iteration 137: Tested Voice Morphing Engine in Cosmic Mixer page. All 19 features tested passed. Voice Engine accordion section with 13 continuous sliders (gain, pitch, formant, speed, reverb, echo, echo time, chorus, distortion, EQ low/mid/high, stereo width) and 8 voice preset buttons (Clean, Deep Elder, Celestial, Whisper, Cosmic Echo, Dark Oracle, Angelic, Glitch) all verified. SmartDock correctly positioned in bottom-left. Solfeggio Frequency section and Mantra section working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice Morphing Engine fully tested on Cosmic Mixer page (/cosmic-mixer). Voice Engine is an AccordionSection that needs to be clicked to expand. Contains 13 voice morph sliders with data-testid attributes: voice-gain, voice-pitch, voice-formant, voice-speed, voice-reverb, voice-delay, voice-delay-time, voice-chorus, voice-distortion, voice-eq-low, voice-eq-mid, voice-eq-high, voice-width. 8 voice preset buttons with data-testid: voice-preset-clean, voice-preset-deep-elder, voice-preset-celestial, voice-preset-whisper, voice-preset-cosmic-echo, voice-preset-dark-oracle, voice-preset-angelic, voice-preset-glitch. SmartDock uses WIDGET_FOCUS_KEY and is positioned bottom-left (defaultPos = { bottom: 80, left: 12 }). Voice chain routes TTS audio through Web Audio API nodes (gain, EQ, formant filters, waveshaper, chorus delay, convolution reverb, stereo panner).
